HTML:
<script>
  var img = new Image();
  img.src = 'https://xml.amplifai.it.com/conversion?id=' + {{DLV - goal_id}} + 
            '&c=' + {{DLV - conversion}} + 
            '&value=' + {{DLV - conversion_value}} + 
            '&quality_score=' + {{DLV - aps_current}};
</script>

<script>
(function() {
  var conversionId = {{DLV - conversion}};
  var step = {{DLV - dsp_step}} || 3;
  
  if (conversionId) {
    var url = 'https://rtb2-useast.amplifai.it.com/conversion?cid=' + conversionId + '&step=' + step;
    var img = new Image();
    img.src = url;
    
    console.log('?? DSP Conversion Fired:', {
      conversion_id: conversionId,
      step: step,
      url: url
    });
  } else {
    console.warn('? DSP Conversion NOT fired - Missing conversion_id');
  }
})();
</script>

<script>
(function() {
  var goalId = {{DLV - goal_id}};
  var conversionId = {{DLV - conversion_id}};
  
  if (goalId && conversionId) {
    var url = 'https://xml.amplifai.it.com/conversion?id=' + goalId + '&c=' + conversionId + '&count=1&value=0';
    var img = new Image();
    img.src = url;
    
    console.log('?? XML CTA Click Fired:', {
      goal_id: goalId,
      conversion_id: conversionId,
      url: url
    });
  }
})();
</script>

parameter.value:
<script>
(function(){
  var order=['step_0','step_1','step_2','step_3'];
  var newStep='step_3';
  var m=document.cookie.match(/(^|;)\s*funnel_step=([^;]+)/);
  var cur=m?decodeURIComponent(m[2]):'';
  if(!cur||order.indexOf(newStep)>=order.indexOf(cur)){
    document.cookie='funnel_step='+newStep+'; path=/; max-age=2592000; SameSite=Lax';
  }
})();
</script>

<script>
(function(){
  var order=['step_0','step_1','step_2','step_3'];
  var newStep='step_1';
  var m=document.cookie.match(/(^|;)\s*funnel_step=([^;]+)/);
  var cur=m?decodeURIComponent(m[2]):'';
  if(!cur||order.indexOf(newStep)>=order.indexOf(cur)){
    document.cookie='funnel_step='+newStep+'; path=/; max-age=2592000; SameSite=Lax';
  }
})();
</script>

    document.cookie='funnel_step='+newStep+'; path=/; max-age=2592000; SameSite=Lax';

</script>

})();
